description: Mandatory disclaimers and human-review gates for regulated domains (legal, finance, hr, healthcare, security, data-ai/PHI). Architecture §29.

rules.reason: PHI / patient-health content detected — clinician review required, cannot auto-write
Legal document detected — attorney review required, not legal advice
Legal-compliance agent output — attorney review required, not legal advice
Finance agent output — requires disclaimer and human review before external use
HR agent output — employment-law caution + human-manager review required
Healthcare agent output — not medical advice, clinician review required
